title: Verify Multi-format Input
description: Validate that Multi-format Input works as described: Parse PDF, PPT, Word, Excel, images, URLs, GitHub repos
expected_result: Multi-format Input functions correctly as specified

title: Verify LLM Analysis
description: Validate that LLM Analysis works as described: Feature extraction, persona derivation, business-rule identification
expected_result: LLM Analysis functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Test Case Generation
description: Validate that Test Case Generation works as described: Functional tests, use-case scenarios, manual checklists with CRUD flows

steps.action: Navigate to Test Case Generation feature

expected_result: Test Case Generation functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Script Generation
description: Validate that Script Generation works as described: Playwright browser tests with LLM + skeleton fallback
expected_result: Script Generation functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Dual-Track QA
description: Validate that Dual-Track QA works as described: Automated execution + manual checklist workflow
expected_result: Dual-Track QA functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Evidence Collection
description: Validate that Evidence Collection works as described: Screenshots, logs, network HAR traces per test run
expected_result: Evidence Collection functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Report Generation
description: Validate that Report Generation works as described: Markdown and HTML reports with evidence attachments
expected_result: Report Generation functions correctly as specified

title: Verify CLI Interface
description: Validate that CLI Interface works as described: Click-based CLI with 13+ commands
expected_result: CLI Interface functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Web GUI
description: Validate that Web GUI works as described: FastAPI + vanilla JS SPA with 7 tabs, detail panel, project dropdown, context bar, i18n
expected_result: Web GUI functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Multi-Project Management
description: Validate that Multi-Project Management works as described: List and manage multiple TestForge projects with independent data
expected_result: Multi-Project Management functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Multiple LLM Providers
description: Validate that Multiple LLM Providers works as described: Anthropic, OpenAI, CLI tools, Ollama support

steps.action: Navigate to Multiple LLM Providers feature

expected_result: Multiple LLM Providers functions correctly as specified

title: Verify Internationalization
description: Validate that Internationalization works as described: EN/KO toggle with 147+ translation keys, localStorage persistence

title: QA Engineer -- primary workflow
description: End-to-end scenario for QA Engineer
scenario_steps: As QA Engineer, navigate to the application
Interact with Multi-format Input
Interact with LLM Analysis
Interact with Test Case Generation
Verify final state matches expectations
expected_outcome: All interactions complete successfully

title: Developer -- primary workflow
description: End-to-end scenario for Developer
scenario_steps: As Developer, navigate to the application
Interact with Multi-format Input
Interact with LLM Analysis

Verify final state matches expectations
expected_outcome: All interactions complete successfully

title: Project Manager -- primary workflow

title: View Multi-format Input list
description: CRUD flow validation for Multi-format Input
scenario_steps: Navigate to Multi-format Input section
Verify list/table is displayed with items
Verify each item shows key information (ID, name, status)
Verify empty state message when no items exist
expected_outcome: List displays all items with sufficient information to identify each one

title: View Multi-format Input detail
description: CRUD flow validation for Multi-format Input
scenario_steps: Navigate to Multi-format Input list
Click on a specific item
Verify detail view shows ALL fields (not just summary)
Verify user can see full description, attributes, metadata
Verify back/close navigation to return to list
expected_outcome: Detail view shows complete information about the selected item

title: Edit Multi-format Input item
description: CRUD flow validation for Multi-format Input
scenario_steps: Navigate to Multi-format Input detail view
Click edit button or inline edit field
Modify one or more fields
Save changes
Verify updated data is reflected in list and detail views
expected_outcome: User can modify item data and changes persist

title: Delete Multi-format Input item
description: CRUD flow validation for Multi-format Input
scenario_steps: Navigate to Multi-format Input list or detail view
Click delete button
Confirm deletion in dialog
Verify item is removed from list
Verify proper feedback (toast or message)
expected_outcome: Item is deleted with confirmation step and user feedback

Verify all UI elements are displayed correctly
Perform the primary action and observe results
Check error handling with invalid input
